examples:
Command Example
#
coach-end-user user="track@securityadvisor.io" context="phishing"
Context Example
#
{
"SecurityAdvisor.CoachUser": {
"coaching_date": "2019-10-04T21:04:19.480425",

outputs.description: Time when coaching was sent or completed. SecurityAdvisor.CoachUser.coaching_status User coaching status for context. "Pending" means that coaching has been sent and is pending. "Done" means the user has completed the coaching.
outputs.name: SecurityAdvisor.CoachUser.coaching_date

outputs.description: User's coaching score (out of 100). SecurityAdvisor.CoachUser.context Coaching context.
outputs.name: SecurityAdvisor.CoachUser.coaching_score
